task:
Change the following LibreOffice Draw application preferences, then ensure LibreOffice fully exits so the changes are flushed to `~/.config/libreoffice/4/user/registrymodifications.xcu`:

- LibreOffice Draw > General: default measurement unit = Inch; default tab stop = 1.25".
- LibreOffice Draw > Grid: 'Snap to grid' enabled.

The settings must persist in `registrymodifications.xcu` after LibreOffice exits.

verification.description: Draw measurement unit is Inch (Metric enum 8)
Default tab stop is 1.25 inch (3175 * 1/100 mm)
